name: Raspberry Streusel Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the whole wheat flour, sugar, brown sugar, salt, and cinnamon.
3. Add the egg and margarine to the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
4. Stir in the milk and raspberries.
5. Fold in the lemon zest.
6. Divide batter evenly among greased or paper-lined muffin cups.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
8. Allow muffins to cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing them and transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
